description_long: This fence is constructed from thick, cylindrical wooden posts arranged vertically and horizontally to form a sturdy barrier. The main structure consists of three vertical posts connected by two horizontal rails, with additional diagonal wooden planks attached in a crisscross pattern for reinforcement and visual interest. The wood appears dark brown, with a matte finish and visible grain texture, suggesting it is untreated or lightly finished timber. The ends of the posts are flat, and there are no decorative caps or finials on top. The fence has a rugged, utilitarian appearance, suitable for use in parks, gardens, or rustic urban settings. The overall design is simple, with the diagonal planks providing a slightly irregular, handcrafted look.
description: A rugged wooden fence made of thick cylindrical posts and rails, reinforced with diagonal planks in a crisscross pattern. The dark brown wood and matte finish give it a rustic, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: The fence is seen from the end, showing the circular cross-sections of the posts and rails, with the diagonal planks barely visible.
description_view_1: The full length of the fence is visible, highlighting the three vertical posts, two horizontal rails, and the crisscrossing diagonal planks.
description_view_2: Another end view, similar to view 0, showing the circular ends of the posts and rails with minimal detail of the diagonal planks.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the fence, showing the same post and rail structure but with a different arrangement of diagonal planks, some of which appear to be missing or broken.
